title: 20 Litre White Bucket With Airtight, Leak-Proof, Tamper Evident Lid & Metal Handle
features: Made From Tough, Food-grade, Chemically Resistant Polypropylene
100% Recyclable Non-toxic Plastic and Does not Contain Bisphenol A (BPA)
Multi-Purpose Bucket for use With Food, Paint, Fermenting, Aquatics, Chemicals and Many Other Uses
Tamper-evident security tab and Secure Metal Handle
Tapered Design Allows for Easy Nesting When Not in Use, And They Are Also Stackable When in Use
description: Product Description Do the Lids Seal Tightly? The bucket lids are designed to seal airtight. Please note that the larger buckets may require additional pressure to ensure the lid is securely sealed. Use the heel of your hand to ensure a tight seal. Are the Buckets Food Safe? The buckets are produced in a state-of-the-art facility adhering to BRC standards, and are made from food-grade polypropylene (PP) making them ideal for use in food, chemicals, animal feed & more. The buckets carry the food safety mark on the base What is the Max Temperature for Liquids in the Buckets? Filling and closing guidelines: Maximum content temperature during filling is 95°C. For stacking, ensure the content temperature is below 45°C. Do not stack more than two warm containers.
